overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a character exploring a dimly lit industrial cantina with warm orange and red lighting. The character walks through various sections including a back room, main cantina floor with NPCs, a blue-lit side room with a holographic display, and finally ascends a grand staircase toward a glowing red archway.

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a dimly lit back room with round metal tables and chairs, walking toward a stone doorway arch. The walls are rough stone with industrial elements. At around 8 seconds, the character passes through the doorway into a narrow corridor.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow corridor and ascends stone stairs, emerging onto a balcony overlooking the main cantina. Metal railings line the path, and industrial pipes run overhead. The bar counter becomes visible in the distance as the lighting shifts to a warmer ambient glow.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main cantina floor, walking past metal pillars and neon lights. The character stops to talk to an NPC in a white coat standing near a pillar. The bar counter is now visible to the left, and industrial machinery occupies the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cantina section with large machinery and dining areas

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the cantina, passing large cylindrical industrial tanks with glowing red bases. Patrons sit at dining tables to the right, eating and drinking. The bar counter recedes into the left background as the character moves deeper into the industrial section.

interacting with a holographic display table showing a rotating spaceship

segments.scene_description: The character enters a side room illuminated by blue neon light, contrasting with the main cantina's warm tones. In the center is a holographic display table projecting a rotating spaceship. Alien symbols glow on the walls, and another NPC stands in the background observing the display.

ascending the final steps toward the large glowing archway at the top

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the blue room and enters a grand stone staircase bathed in red neon light. The character ascends the steps toward a massive glowing red archway adorned with alien symbols at the top of the stairs. Stone railings line the path as the character approaches the illuminated archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded industrial back room into the bustling, warmly lit atmosphere of a main cantina. It begins in a dimly lit space with rough stone walls and metal furniture, moving steadily toward a stone doorway arch. As the character passes through the arch, the scene shifts into a narrow corridor and ascends a set of stone stairs, emerging onto a balcony where industrial pipes overhead lead the way toward a distant, glowing bar counter. The camera then descends from the balcony onto the main floor, passing metal pillars and neon lights before pausing as the character engages with an NPC in a white coat. The environment finally opens up fully to reveal the expansive cantina, with the bar counter to the left and heavy industrial machinery filling the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial cantina that transitions from warm orange tones into a cool blue sanctuary before ending at a glowing red monument. It begins by moving past large cylindrical industrial tanks with glowing red bases and dining patrons, as the bar counter recedes into the background. The scene then shifts abruptly as the character enters a side room bathed in contrasting blue neon light, centering on a holographic display of a rotating spaceship and glowing alien symbols. Leaving the blue illumination behind, the camera moves toward a grand stone staircase where the lighting returns to a deep red. The shot finally ascends the steps along stone railings, approaching a massive glowing red archway adorned with alien symbols.
